underlying_goal: Debug and fix multiple cascading bugs in a Laravel-based AI document extraction pipeline, particularly around classification descriptions, duplicate object creation, and deduplication logic
friction_detail: Claude needed corrections on lock scope (per-name vs per-type+rootObject) and introduced a column name bug (value vs text_value), and user had to enforce guardrails about service purity and immutability.
brief_summary: User debugged 8+ cascading bugs across an LLM extraction pipeline over 8.5 hours, with Claude successfully identifying root causes, implementing fixes with passing tests, and managing Trello cards, though needing user course-corrections on approach decisions.
